## Topic

Code review standards and practices.

## Key Facts

- All PRs require at least one approval before merge
- Use conventional comments (suggestion, issue, nitpick)
- Focus on correctness, security, and maintainability — not style

## Insights

- Smaller PRs get faster, better reviews
- Reviewers should run the code, not just read it

## Connections

_None yet._

## Open Questions

- Should we adopt a formal review checklist?
